title: lithocarpus amherstianus
intro: Lithocarpus amherstianus, also known as Amherst's Lithocarpus or Amherst's Bur, is a species of flowering plant in the beech family Fagaceae. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and digestive problems. Lithocarpus amherstianus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although its availability and usage may vary due to its classification and regulations.
